data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design prioritizes easy access to frequently used features to enhance user experience.
data.technical_spec: Main controls and playlists are placed for quick and intuitive reach.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Designed to minimize decision-making time by offering a manageable number of options.
data.technical_spec: Simplified menus and options to facilitate faster user selection processes.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Focus on visually pleasing designs that users perceive as easier to use.
data.technical_spec: Consistent use of branding colors, modern typography, and uncluttered layouts.

data.title: Weber’s Law of Just Noticeable Differences
data.description: Subtle changes in the interface are designed to be intuitive and noticeable.
data.technical_spec: Incremental adjustments in volume slider and progress bar for precise control.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related elements to imply a relationship, aiding user comprehend of the interface.
data.technical_spec: Proximity is used for grouping tracks, playlists, and controls.
